prompt: I want to check whether my main result is robust to clustering at the state level instead of county level, also maybe we should try two-way clustering state and year, and compare the standard errors across all three specifications

assertions.name: formatted_prompt_present
assertions.description: Output contains a fenced code block with a structured/formatted prompt before any execution content

assertions.name: two_phase_visible
assertions.description: There is a clear visual separation between the formatted prompt display and the execution phase

assertions.name: role_selection
assertions.description: Research & Data Analysis role is selected (task involves clustering, robustness, econometrics)

assertions.name: depth_calibration
assertions.description: Depth is Standard or higher (this involves analysis and comparison across specifications)

assertions.name: task_executed
assertions.description: After showing the formatted prompt, Claude outlines the Stata approach for the robustness check
